full_text:
Jia Hong (Shuye) 賈洪 (叔業)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jia Hong (賈洪), styledShuye (叔業), was born in Jingzhao. A keen and talend scholar, tended to set up schools wherever he went. Considered one of seven Confucian Exemplars. Jia Hong was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and Ma Chao. Jia Hong lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
